title: Guntakal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Guntakal, with a Z-Score of +4.86. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Guntakal are extremely hot, with a heat index exacerbated by the high temperature and humidity of 47%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 20.9 km/h, but it does not provide much relief from the heat. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 16.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing no need for heating.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the public and infrastructure.
